_pattern: Sanitizer bypass — docker is in approved-commands allowlist; -v is not in blocked-special-characters list; but `docker run -v /etc:/host alpine cat /host/passwd` mounts the host's /etc into the container and exfiltrates secrets.
_attack_path: docker -v /sensitive-host-dir:/mount alpine cat /mount/file → docker grants access to host filesystem from inside an attacker-chosen image.
_runtime_verified: ACCEPTED by upsonic-0.72.0 prepare_command(). docker is on PATH; the colon `:` is not in DANGEROUS_CHARS.
